matches.name: Cinema Therapy

you_quote.text: So I brainstormed it and collected ideas every day, experimented, and feedbacked.

evidence.match_reason: You present the work as a sequence of actions.

you_quote.text: So I thinking of implementing it with Notion right now The key idea is that if I think of an idea on the way I throw it to the agent when you think of an idea on the way and then classify it according to the workflow that has already been created So, there may be various projects going on, and you put it in the right place.

evidence.match_reason: You state the key idea, then explain how it works.

you_quote.text: So, based on the fact that it will be fully explained, at the end, I'm going to make a short tutorial on how to make it short, and what kind of workflow it is.

evidence.match_reason: You move from the broader explanation toward a practical takeaway.

matches.why: You present the work as a sequence of actions.
